zh-CN.name: 动物饲养员
zh-CN.intro: 动物饲养员是照顾小动物的人。他们每天给动物宝宝们喂食、打扫房间，还会陪它们玩耍，让动物们健康快乐。

story.title: 🐼熊猫宝宝的饲养员
story.body: 星期天，妈妈带我去动物园。我们看到一只可爱的小熊猫，毛茸茸的，正抱着竹子啃。旁边站着一位穿蓝色工作服的阿姨，她是熊猫宝宝的饲养员。她手里提着一个大桶，里面装满新鲜的竹子和水果。她轻轻唤着熊猫的名字，把食物放在石头上。熊猫宝宝跑过来，吃得津津有味。吃完后，阿姨用扫帚把笼舍打扫得干干净净，又用水管冲洗地面。她还给熊猫挠痒痒，熊猫高兴地打滚。我问阿姨：‘你每天都来照顾熊猫吗？’阿姨笑着说：‘是啊，我要让熊猫宝宝健康长大。’我觉得动物饲养员真了不起，我也想像她一样和动物做朋友。

knowledge.title: 动物饲养员用什么工具照顾动物？
knowledge.body: 动物饲养员有很多工具：大桶用来装食物，扫帚用来打扫笼舍，水管用来冲洗地面。他们穿统一的工作服和胶靴，有时还戴手套保护自己。

en.name: Animal Keeper
en.intro: An animal keeper is someone who takes care of animals. They feed the animals, clean their homes, and play with them every day to keep them healthy and happy.

story.title: 🐼The Little Panda's Caretaker
story.body: One Sunday, Mom took me to the zoo. We saw a cute little panda, fluffy and cuddly, munching on bamboo. Next to the panda stood a lady in a blue uniform—she was the panda's keeper. She carried a big bucket filled with fresh bamboo and fruits. Softly calling the panda's name, she placed the food on a rock. The little panda ran over and ate with joy. Afterward, the keeper swept the enclosure clean with a broom and rinsed the floor with a hose. She even tickled the panda, and it rolled around happily. I asked, 'Do you come to take care of the panda every day?' The keeper smiled, 'Yes, I have to make sure the little panda grows up healthy.' I think animal keepers are amazing. I want to be friends with animals just like her.

knowledge.title: What tools do animal keepers use?
knowledge.body: Animal keepers have many tools: big buckets for food, brooms for cleaning, and hoses for washing the floors. They also wear uniforms and boots, and sometimes gloves to protect themselves.
